description: Your rocketry team has designed an optimized swept fin planform using Computational Fluid Dynamics (CFD). Modify the 'simple_model_rocket.ork' design by replacing the standard trapezoidal fins with a 3-fin Freeform Fin set (3.0 mm thickness) attached to the Body Tube. Use the following X,Y shape coordinates in millimeters: Point 1 (0,0), Point 2 (45,50), Point 3 (65,50), and Point 4 (75,0). Save the updated design to /home/ga/Documents/rockets/freeform_rocket.ork. Generate a flight simulation report at /home/ga/Documents/exports/fin_integration_report.txt including the fin type, thickness, simulated apogee altitude, and stability margin.
